review_title: UserWay Accessibility Widget is an ADA Compliance accessibility game changer!
description: Overall I am a very happy with UserWay's widget, their support team, and their offerings as a whole. Their price point is very reasonable. I highly recommend them to all my colleagues.
author: Joe S.
pros: UserWay Accessibility Widget is a game changer. For us it was super easy to set up, install, and it's been up and running since 2023 without issue. The live chat support is incredibly knowledgeable, quick with their response times, and always makes sure to go the extra mile in completing our requests timely and correctly. The features and options within UserWays accessibility widgets are the best I've found. Their seamless integration with my Shopify store makes them the best of the best.
cons: I sometimes find that I get decision paralysis and the amount of options they offer within their widgets gets a bit overwhelming.

review_title: Userway is the most fair service for merchants.
description: It works well. And it allows my clients to see it work on a basic level, before upgrading to all the bells and whistles. Accesibe doesn't have a basic level so I don't use them at all now.
author: Anthony S.
pros: It provides a good tool for vision impaired individuals. It also provides some coverage for merchants who can't afford PRO, but most likely will choose it in the future as it becomes more essential through state legislation.
cons: The cost for PRO. Clients avoid the extra cost. But at least I can set them up with a basic widget where they can pivot to the advanced widget easily when the time comes.

review_title: Replaces manual WCAG checks completely
description: I rolled this out across our marketing and member portals to stop wasting engineering time on routine accessibility sweeps. We got the free version live on production in under an hour. It costs a fraction of what we'd pay in manual dev hours, and the automated fixes actually scale with our site.
author: Ego F.
pros: It completely kills the need for manual accessibility fixes. We were burning days of engineering time upfront and every month just to keep up with WCAG standards. The AI handles compliance automatically as we ship new content, keeping our dev queue clear.
cons: The pricing jump from the free tier to the $1,190/yr Pro Plus plan is steep. They really need better middle-tier options or dedicated pricing for early-stage startups and healthcare platforms.

review_title: Worse than having no ADA coverage on your website.
description: The worst waste of money I have dealt with in a very long time.
author: Kelly P.
pros: Because they say they will support you if one of these crappy ads lawsuits come up, but they don’t. You will have to hire a lawyer, because guess what? Their software does not cover ADA compliance. Seriously, don’t get me started, because I could talk for days about the “legal” support they provide. In fact, leave your company name in the comments, if there are comments, and I would be happy to reach out and tell you ever detail of my interaction with userway, including what I have in writing. Buyer beware!
cons: Let’s see…,the fact that you promise legal security, but don’t deliver it. An amazing act of being complete sheisters.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ease and confidence
description: Heading user way accessibility widget gives us the confidence that we’re doing the right thing and that we are protected and most importantly everyone can access, understand and ultimately enjoy our business.
author: Anthony S.
pros: As someone who’s not in Internet, design or production, I found it very easy to install and utilize the widget. I had access to the file and abilities to customize the size and position. It was very - easy process.
cons: I can’t say there are any cons. Pricing was right, the installation was easy and communication was quick and swift.

review_title: UserWay is a Great Choice for Those Getting Started with Accessibility Compliance
description: Our experience with the widget has been excellent. It allowed us to go from almost no compliance to a high level of compliance in a relatively short time.
author: Charles S.
pros: The widget was super-easy to implement, which was important for my company, because we manage about 50 different websites.
cons: Honestly, I'd be hard pressed to find something that I didn't like about the widget.

review_title: Solid Accessibility Tool
description: Overall, UserWay’s Accessibility Widget delivers solid performance and value, though refining the support experience and UI clarity would further enhance its appeal.
author: Nate W.
pros: We appreciated the widget’s ease of installation, customization, and reliable performance, along with its competitive pricing compared to options like accessiBe.
cons: The main drawbacks were delayed and unclear customer support, frequent changes in account managers, and a portal UI that could be more intuitive.

review_title: I like userway, easy to use, easy to implement, great support.
description: I like userway, easy to use, easy to implement, great support. I don't personally use the widget much except for implementing it and clicking around to make sure its working but I havn't heard any complaints from customers about the product so I like it.
author: Jason C.
pros: Ease of use, ease of implementation, the support chat is always very responsive. I have not had any issues with anyone complaining about using the widget so to me thats a win.
cons: I am a developer, I don't actually use the widget that much but I implement it. I would comment the language selector, I don't like how it flashes the native language and then it translates it, this has to do with how the page loads then userway widget but its not a great experience in my opinion.

review_title: A fully customizable, legally compliant Accessibility Widget that will keep you covered.
description: Overall I would say that the UserWay Accessibility Widget has been an invaluable part of our eCommerce experience. It allows us to better serve all demographics who may be interested in our product offerings while remaining legally covered.
author: Andrew L.
pros: I appreciate the ability to customize the UserWay widget and implement it in a lot of various, intuitive ways. It's an out of the box solution that can cover your ADA needs, while being implemented in a unique and custom way that fits your brand voice and style guidelines.
cons: The default implementation of the widget is slightly intrusive and takes up a little bit too much real estate, but UserWay offers many ways to have the widget only triggered when needed, as well as customizing the placement and size of the widget selector.

review_title: User Way Accessibility is the best tool out there!
author: Sean S.
pros: I loved the fact that it was super easy to install and configure. It offers a wide range of features too! I love how quick any changes you make are published instantly. UserWay is by far the best accessibility widget tool out on the market!
cons: I cannot find anything I have not liked so far. This is a great tool. If i had to list maybe one con, is that I did not find this solution sooner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Accessibility Made Simple — With Support That Truly Delivers
description: I came in expecting a weekend project. You know — tabs open, tutorials, maybe a few curse words. But instead, I got something rare: a product that just works. UserWay didn’t ask me to be a developer. It didn’t bury me in jargon. It simply said, “Paste this,” and two minutes later, my website was accessible and running with features I didn’t even know I needed — font adjustments, contrast tweaks, keyboard navigation, screen reader support — all baked in like it’s no big deal. (But trust me, it is.) Then came the support test. I had a quick question, sent it in, and boom — before I even finished reading “Hi 👋,” the answer hit my screen. No tickets, no bots pretending to be human, just actual humans being helpful at record speed. In a world full of overpromising tools, UserWay quietly overdelivered. That’s rare. And that’s why I’ll recommend it without hesitation.
author: Manoj S.
pros: I was looking for a simple, no-fuss accessibility solution for my website — and UserWay delivered beyond expectations. As someone non-technical, I expected a bit of a learning curve. But to my surprise, I had UserWay installed on Acropolitan.com in under 2 minutes. The instructions were clean, straightforward, and the widget was live and fully functional instantly — no tech headaches, no fluff. The experience only got better when I needed help. I reached out to support with a quick question, and honestly, the response was so fast, it felt like the issue was resolved before I even finished reading “Hi.” That kind of responsiveness builds trust fast. Pros: -->Incredibly easy to install -->Clear, concise setup instructions -->Fully featured out of the box Seamless experience even for non-technical users
cons: None, really — but I do want to highlight that their support team was so quick and helpful, it deserves a special mention. Getting real-time help without friction is rare and appreciated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing, easy to use product to enhance patient experience!
author: Youseph A.
pros: I got the UserWay widget because we want to help out all of our patients including ones that are special needs and to make our website accessible to everyone. We get a lot of compliments but we hope that is from all potential clientele.
cons: It's really easy to use and I cannot think of a con about the widget. The only con is the price in my opinion.

review_title: Professional and Helpful Support Team
description: The support team was very professional and considerate to my questions and technical issues that were resolved immediately.
author: Joey Z.
pros: I really like the ease of use and customization, customer support very helpful with technical and sales questions.
cons: nothing to report, it's probably the best ADA widget solution on the internet after researching many providers.

review_title: Easy to Use and Set Up
description: Overall it was easy to use and set up. We have heard from clients it is easy to use on their phone and computer.
author: Jessica H.
pros: I liked how easy it was to be able to put on our website. Especially for someone who is not tech savvy. It also seems easy and accessible for our clients to use when accessing our website.
cons: I have not complaints about UserWay Accessibility. We have not run into any errors on our end that make the product hard to use for us or our clients.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Tool for Accessibility!
author: Lexie K.
pros: The accessibility widget makes it easy for our website to be user-friendly to all people. We have had no complaints!
cons: We do not have any complaints about the accessibility widget. It has been working very well for us and we don't have to worry.

review_title: Great Tool For Confirming Accessibility
description: Very helpful for our websites to determine whether or not there are issues with accessibility. This is an important component for users.
author: Dee M.
pros: It performs as promised, specified what needs to be done.
cons: It pops up each time the page is refreshed with even a simple change.

review_title: Mr. [sensitive content hidden] is a very valuable asset to your establishment!
description: I needed assistance with several different things and Mr. [sensitive content hidden] was able to assist with everything. He helped me get logged in, get my name updated and even went so far as to help me get the widget updated!
author: Jennifer E.
pros: I don't know a lot about the widget but I can tell you that Mr. [sensitive content hidden], who I chatted with, was a top notch associate!
cons: There wasn't anything I did not like, Mr. [sensitive content hidden] was the best chat agent with whom I have ever had the pleasure of working!

review_title: Easy way to make websites more accessible!
description: Relatively user friendly on the back end, and our customers love how easily it helps make their site accessible.
author: Kailyn N.
pros: It seamlessly creates a more accessible site for users with various visual impairments.
cons: Can be a bit tricky to navigate how to update, but very few complaints.

review_title: My experience with UserWay Accessibility widget
description: was great and helpful, even loved the part when I needed some help in some issue or feature, getting an immediate support
author: Hajar O.
pros: the solid and complete Accessibility features that covers every application needs and it's easy to use
cons: it's not leaving much room for styling the accessibility widget itself for the consuming applications

review_title: Good Product
description: Totally satisfied. Excellent product and very easy to use.
author: Sebastian P.
pros: Easy and intuitive. Excellent product and very easy to use.
cons: that the widget language setting is connected to the language detected in the wordpress platform, I would like it to be eligible independently.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: 5 Stars for UserWay
description: UserWay and their team of experts are easy to work with, answer our questions promptly and have always delivered on their word.
author: Eric V.
pros: We love the ability to quickly change settings, and offer additional services through the widget.
cons: I don't like the fact that you need to open the widget to change languages. It is not intuitive to open an ADA widget to select a language. I feel we could be selling this feature more as an add-on if we could toggle it from outside the widget.

review_title: Lots of useful features under one roof!
description: Good overall - it provides lots of useful features in one package. It just doesn't blend into your own branding as well as it could.
author: James B.
pros: I like the speed at which the changes are applied in real time and the accuracy when changes are made.
cons: The lack of customisable theme options for both the icon and the menu when expanded.

review_title: Vital tool for any website!
description: Excellent, even when I have needed support the live chat guys have been on hand immediately.
author: Adrian J.
pros: The widget contains all of the required tools for people with various disability or requirements, whether it be visual impairment, dyslexia or anything else, and the trigger icon is small enough not to get in the way when it is not required.
cons: I cannot think of any negatives at this point.

review_title: Great For ADA Compliance
description: Easy install and configure. Easy cleanup. Thanks
author: Erik D.
pros: Instant clean up of issues. explanation of how to fix everything else
cons: Nothing really. Easier to use the embed code than the app

review_title: Easy to implement and use
description: Overall it has been great, this is a wonderful tool to give us piece of mind that people of all abilities can use our site.
author: Karin P.
pros: It was beyond easy to add to the site. It is also easy to move around and use overall. Great value for what it does!
cons: the dashboard can be a little confusing to navigate.
